unrealPlan.ceiling: near-real premium entertainment city with game/sport/social systems
unrealPlan.warning: Photoreal is not enough. STATIC has to look real and still feel unmistakably like STATIC.

visualStylePrinciples: Characters, streets, vehicles, venues, crowds, and interiors should feel physically believable, not toy-like or browser-game flat.
Reality gets pushed through black glass, wet pavement, violet/champagne neon, signal screens, premium wardrobe, and broadcast-city motion.
Outfits, jewelry, vehicles, properties, companions, passes, tables, and entrances must communicate rank and access at a glance.
The city needs fan movement, phones up, venue lines, club tables, arena nights, valet flows, and NPC clusters before true multiplayer scales.
Arrival, travel, sports, shopping, rooftop, racing, and club moments should feel like authored shots first, then controllable gameplay.
animationStylePrinciples: Walks, idles, sitting, driving, valet, shopping, dancing, cheering, drinking, and talking should start from believable human motion.
Mr. Stone and high-status Entities should move with calm control: no cartoon bounce, no stiff mannequin energy, no cheap idle loops.
Arena fans, club dancers, rooftop hosts, guards, valets, racers, shoppers, and companions all need distinct loop libraries.
Use MetaHuman-compatible characters and capture/retargeting where possible for faces, hands, posture, and conversation.
Companions, portals, billboards, music-reactive lights, combat modes, racing, and S.A.G.E. can carry the heightened STATIC magic.
milestones: Create the Unreal project with source control, folder standards, input/camera baseline, and STATIC visual test map.
Rebuild the hero district as a small real-time scene: wet street, towers, signage, crowd shells, club/arena/radio landmarks.
Convert or build Mr. Stone as the first production-quality playable MetaHuman with wardrobe/accessory slots.
Block idle, walk, turn, sit, car entry/exit, drink/cigar, valet, phone, VIP couch, cheering, club, and arena fan loops.
Luxury SUV, valet pickup, strip cruise, first-person window view, chase cam, and return-to-tower route.
STATIC Arena basketball shell, Club STATIC, Market Walk, Radio Rooftop, and STATIC Tower all connected by route/camera handoffs.
